THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ TERESA S AKA GOMEZ TERESA GOMEZ IPOLO $205.14 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $288.14, BOTH, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
